title: Modular Prototype Kit Game
genericDescription: Create reusable gameplay modules; document APIs for future self and teammates; assemble a complete game from components.
specificDescription: Build a small game using at least five reusable components such as health, inventory, interactable, timer, spawner, dialogue trigger, or ability module. Include a sample scene demonstrating each component.
gradingRubric: 30 pts modularity; 20 pts complete final game; 20 pts component demo scene; 15 pts documentation; 15 pts maintainable code.
